# Pull Request Checklist

## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Mobile Impact (Required)
- [ ] No mobile impact
- [ ] Mobile impact exists and linked issue/PR created in `oxy-portfolio-mobile`
- Affected flows:
- Linked mobile issue/PR:

## Contract Impact
- [ ] No contract changes
- [ ] Contract files updated under `contracts/`
- [ ] `contracts/changelog/CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Breaking change (major bump required)

## Validation
- [ ] Web tests/build passed
- [ ] Mobile parity actions tracked
